title: Add build order and production order scaffold
summary: Add only the build-order and production-order scaffolding needed by the M2 vertical slice, with serializable progress and structured failure reasons.
acceptance: Build/order demand registers and removes WorkOffers from owner-state changes
Required inputs are reserved before work starts and serializable progress is stored in explicit lanes
Completion commits deterministically through existing command/tick phases
Structured reasons distinguish missing materials invalid target blocked site reservation conflict path failure and policy failure
Scope is limited to the M2 vertical slice and excludes broad production chains or catalog expansion

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Provide the minimal serializable build/order scaffold required for the M2 scenario.
forbiddenPaths: building catalog or balance content expansion
benchmarkImpact: Feeds the M2 long-run benchmark but does not independently update benchmark baselines.
reviewRouting: Owner completes to reviewer; gameplay-designer may clarify fixture semantics but must not expand scope into broad content.
rollbackModel: Revert branch; no persisted compatibility promise is created beyond the focused M2 harness.
ownerGate: Keep job progress explicit and serializable
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Build/order scaffold defines serializable job behavior and production-order ownership.
